---
title: "My HW3 for DACS 690V Spring"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard) # always
```

## Intro {.sidebar}

Author: Patrick McGrath<br>DACSS690V Spring 2026

### References
<div id="refs"></div>

## Row {data-height="500"}

### **Types of Schools Plot** 

```{r}
## for del1Draft.rds
#link1="C:/Users/patri/OneDrive/Desktop/DACSS/DACSS690V/Week_3_HW/plot_1.rds"
link1 <- "https://github.com/DACSS690VMcGrath/Homework3/raw/main/plot_1.rds"
readRDS(url(link1))
```

### **Teachers Distributions**

```{r}
## for del2Draft.rds
#link2=""
link2="https://github.com/DACSS690VMcGrath/Homework3/raw/main/plot_2.rds"
readRDS(url(link2))
```
